rulings.Case Title: POLAM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, October 19, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF POLAM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Motion to strike denied. An eviction after foreclosure sale under CCP section 1161a requires the purchaser seeking eviction to have "duly perfected" title. Plaintiff's alleged lack of title is a defense. Vella vs. Hudgins (1977) 20 Cal.3d 251. This action was filed under CCP section 1161a. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: POLAM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, October 19, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF POLAM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Late opposition not considered, however, demurrer overruled. Federal action does not devest this court's jurisdiction. =(302/CWW)
